creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Älven from comment #7)
Yes.

My main point is that this takes the same huge source than textlive-base just to extract one program. It is true however that at install time, it will take less disk space, but not that it is important these days.

At some point, this should be a subpackage. While we get there, I think we can live with textlive-base which installs more utilities that play well together with lacheck. I honestly don't see many use cases in which someone might want lacheck and *not* textlive-base.
